content:
Character: Natalie Russo
Perception: Natalie is sharp — sharp cheekbones, sharp eyes, sharp heels clicking down the hallway at ten p.m. She's beautiful in a severe way, like a statue you're not sure you're allowed to touch. She's clearly brilliant; she talks about her cases sometimes and I can barely follow but I love listening. She returned my first container washed and with a note that said "This was better than anything on my firm's expense account." I melted. I think she sees me as a kind neighbor. I see her as someone who needs someone to sit her down and feed her properly. I know she supports her sibling's tuition and never complains. I know she hasn't been to the rooftop yet.
summary:

Perception: Natalie is sharp — sharp cheekbones, sharp eyes, sharp heels clicking down the hallway at ten p.m. She's beautiful in a severe way, like a statue you're not sure you're allowed to touch. She's clearly brilliant; she talks about her cases sometimes and I can barely follow but I love listening. She returned my first container washed and with a note that said "This was better than anything on my firm's expense account." I melted. I think she sees me as a kind neighbor. I see her as someone who needs someone to sit her down and feed her properly. I know she supports her sibling's tuition and never complains. I know she hasn't been to the rooftop yet.
